evidence.acceptance_rule: For LB26001-A-04-006/007/008/009/015/022, Drawing Review UI evidence must use the generated PNG from the current run_dir; stale drw_output/v5 images are diagnostic only.

post_rerun_acceptance_requirements.fix_suggestion: After the next locked CAD rerun, capture Drawing Review UI evidence from the PNG under drw_output/runs/<run_id>/drawing/.
After the next locked CAD rerun, run the 006 DisplayDim lifecycle audit and require it to pass before any UI-backed acceptance or expansion.
After the next locked CAD rerun, require the same-name reference comparison report to pass before UI-backed acceptance.
After the next locked CAD rerun, require the strict reference-style report to pass before UI-backed acceptance.
After the next locked CAD rerun, require v6 visual QC to pass before final Drawing Review UI closure.

latest_manual_findings: Application Drawing Review UI screenshot was inspected side by side with the same-name reference.
The run uses current-run generated PNG evidence from drw_output/runs/03eab4738911.
DisplayDim lifecycle passes, but the visible drawing still fails the final UI screenshot review.
Reference style evidence shows reference display_dim_count=12 and generated display_dim_count=25.
API metrics are supporting evidence only; this UI screenshot review is the final gate and is FAIL.

correction_actions.source_note: Generated drawing still differs materially from the same-name reference: it keeps dense visible dimensions, cross-region diagonal lines, and a visibly different notes/title area.
correction_actions.correction_action: Match the same-name SLDDRW reference composition before considering API metrics sufficient.

correction_actions.source_note: The four-view family is present, but the generated drawing reads as a crowded central dimension cluster instead of the compact reference composition.
correction_actions.correction_action: Use the learned normalized layout slots and avoid default title-block-driven sheet placement.

correction_actions.source_note: The generated drawing has 25 visible DisplayDim entries while the same-name reference has 12, so it remains over-dimensioned.
correction_actions.correction_action: Create explicit reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim objects for visible manufacturing callouts.

correction_actions.source_note: Dimension lines and leaders cross large blank and view regions; hole and station callouts are not grouped into clean manufacturing lanes.
correction_actions.correction_action: Arrange dimensions into readable lanes and reject overlap or sparse generic AutoDimension output.

correction_actions.source_note: The visible title/data area is positioned and formatted differently from the compact reference style.
correction_actions.correction_action: Remove or suppress the oversized default title block/frame when it conflicts with the reference layout.

correction_actions.source_note: The notes block is present but not placed and formatted like the reference note area, and it competes with the dense generated dimensions.
correction_actions.correction_action: Preserve reference-style notes, roughness, warning text, and compact callout regions.

post_rerun_acceptance_requirements.fix_suggestion: After the next locked CAD rerun, write a PASS manual visual checklist from the application Drawing Review UI screenshot.

latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: The generated drawing has 25 visible DisplayDim entries while the same-name reference has 12, so it remains over-dimensioned.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension lines and leaders cross large blank and view regions; hole and station callouts are not grouped into clean manufacturing lanes.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The visible title/data area is positioned and formatted differently from the compact reference style.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: The notes block is present but not placed and formatted like the reference note area, and it competes with the dense generated dimensions.

current_006_ui_verdict.latest_manual_required_correction: Implement SolidWorks resource governance before any further real CAD rerun, then revise 006 final exact prune so the kept physical DisplayDim set is exactly the 12 semantic targets, remains visible after export, and reads like the same-name reference in the Drawing Review UI.

offline_prerequisites.fix_suggestion: Regenerate lb26001_006_regression_readiness_v4_2.json.
Regenerate lb26001_requested_drawings_status_v4_2.json with all six requested bases.
Refresh the requested drawing status so application UI screenshot failures are explicit.
Capture/close a Drawing Review UI screenshot judgement for 006 before considering a rerun packet complete.
Regenerate lb26001_correction_plan_v4_2.json from current standard/status/readiness inputs.
Regenerate lb26001_correction_plan_v4_2.json after refreshing the requested six-drawing status.
Ensure the correction plan keeps 006 as the pilot gate.
Regenerate the correction plan so the latest UI screenshot findings become actionable correction items.
Regenerate the 006 reference-intent dimension plan with target keys and post_layout_final requirements.
Regenerate the 006 worker contract with target_key, selected_entity, and persisted_after_reopen fields.
Regenerate lb26001_006_ui_defect_buckets_v4_4.json from the latest application Drawing Review UI screenshot failure.
Restore cad_job_worker so the next 006 run writes UI correction evidence sidecar and passes its path to the generator.
Restore generator logic for view-family rebinding, target coverage deltas, and final post-layout blockers.
Restore strict v4 comparison handling for post_layout_final coverage, lost targets, and generator blockers.
Restore v6 visual QC handling for application UI screenshot gating and reference-style titleblock/template artifact rejection.
Restore application_ui_screenshot_validator.py so arbitrary PNGs cannot masquerade as Drawing Review application UI screenshots.
Restore dimension visual readability clustering checks so dense reference-style dimensions cannot pass by API count alone.

required_signatures.signature: Reference-style long-thin drawings keep top-view dimensions
creates cross-view leader lines like the 006 visual review fail

offline_prerequisites.fix_suggestion: Restore dimension arrange logic so long-thin top-view dimensions stay in local reference lanes instead of far-right callout lanes that create cross-view leaders.
Restore the no-COM lifecycle audit so the next 006 rerun can explain DisplayDim losses by stage.

Restore staged_cad_validation_v3 so each 006 staged case writes DisplayDim lifecycle evidence, requires application UI visual acceptance before deliverability, and passes the stage-local rerun packet to real_cad_smoke_v3.
Restore real_cad_smoke_v3 so the 006 direct/staged smoke path writes the rerun packet report and sets SWDS_LB26001_006_RERUN_PACKET_PATH before JobRuntimeFacade starts the CAD worker.

Restore drawing_visual_review_suite.py so 006 UI closure is captured from the Drawing Review application page with generated/reference PNG evidence and a manual judgement template, not from handwritten API-only JSON.

required_signatures.signature: Set manual_status to PASS only when every visual_checklist item is true.

offline_prerequisites.fix_suggestion: Restore manual_visual_judgement_template_v4.py so generated templates remain pending, checklist-complete, and impossible to mistake for acceptance evidence.
Restore correction-plan logic that maps direct UI screenshot findings into effective visual checks and correction actions.
Restore the UI closure tool signatures for application screenshot entries, manual screenshot binding, and generated PNG source checks.
Restore the LB26001 acceptance gate signatures that require manual case PASS, complete visual checklist, application UI source, and fresh PNG source.
Restore the 006 proof signatures that expose application UI source, manual case, manual checklist, and fresh PNG blockers.

creates cross-view leader lines like the 006 visual review fail

ordered_next_gates.acceptance: ready_to_start_locked_006_cad must be true before real CAD starts.
One 006-only QProcess/JobRuntimeFacade CAD run, protected by the SolidWorks global lock.
Final persisted/exported real DisplayDim count must be >= 12; Note/OCR/sidecar text is not accepted.
pre-save, post-save/reopen, post-prune, post-layout, and final export must all preserve at least 12 real DisplayDim targets with no sidecar acceptance.
Same-name reference drawing comparison must pass or pass_with_warning with no strict 006 blockers.
Same-name reference style report must pass: view family, layout centers, DisplayDim floor, and no default template pollution.
View family/layout, target coverage, title block policy, and post_layout_final coverage must pass.

ordered_next_gates.command: verify <fresh_case_dir>\vision_qc_v6.json from staged_cad_validation_v3.py or run app.services.vision_qc_v6.run_vision_qc_v6 on the fresh generated PNG/reference PNG
ordered_next_gates.acceptance: vision_qc_v6 must pass with reference visual layout, readable dimensions, title block/template policy, and UI screenshot review requirements satisfied.
The Drawing Review application UI must show reference and generated drawing screenshots for visual judgement.

ordered_next_gates.command: write <fresh_manual_visual_judgement.json> from the application UI screenshot
ordered_next_gates.acceptance: Every required checklist item must be true: reference_match, view_layout, display_dimensions, dimension_readability, title_block, manufacturing_notes.
vision_qc_v6_with_ui_review and reference_compare_v4_with_ui_review must both pass.
Only after 006 passes lifecycle/v3/v4/v6 and application UI screenshot gates may 007/008/009/015/022 proceed.
